text.p: Adelaide Metropolitan, Mount Lofty Ranges, Lower Eyre Peninsula, Eastern Eyre Peninsula, Yorke Peninsula, Flinders, Mid North and Kangaroo Island districts.
The State Emergency Service advises the following:
* You should never walk, ride or drive through floodwater.
* Keep clear of creeks and storm drains.
* Beware of debris on the road.

warning-info.text: No further warnings will be issued for this event.

text.p: Check https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts. Warnings are also available through TV and Radio broadcasts or call 1300 659 210. The Bureau and State Emergency Service would appreciate warnings being broadcast regularly.

forecast-period.text: Abnormally high tides for Gulf coasts.

text.p: Weather Situation: A deep low-pressure system to the southeast continues tracking eastwards towards Bass Strait, bringing strong to near gale-force westerly winds and elevated sea levels.

hazard.text: Adelaide Metropolitan, Mount Lofty Ranges, Lower Eyre Peninsula, Eastern Eyre Peninsula, Yorke Peninsula, Flinders, Mid North and Kangaroo Island
